title: Crispy Smash Burger
instructions: Divide beef into 4 loose balls; keep cold.
Heat a cast-iron pan until very hot.
Place ball in pan, smash thin, season, and cook until edges are crisp.
Flip, add cheese, cook 30-60 seconds, then move to bun.
Toast buns and assemble with onion, pickles, and sauce.

title: Spiced Mango Lassi
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust honey or salt.

title: Weeknight Garlic Broccoli Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta in salted water; add broccoli in the last 2 minutes.
Reserve 1 cup pasta water, then drain.
Saute garlic and chili flakes in olive oil for 1 minute.
Add pasta and broccoli, splash in pasta water, and toss until glossy.
Finish with parmesan, salt, and pepper.
